message:
test: add real-world sanitized fixtures and 3-provider round-trip matrix tests

Introduces a new integration test suite that validates lossless round-trip
conversion using sanitized artifacts derived from real provider sessions.
Each fixture contains 8+ messages with tool calls, ensuring non-trivial
coverage of the canonical IR pipeline.

Test matrix:
- cc -> codex -> gemini -> cc (lossless assertion)
- codex -> cc -> gemini -> codex (lossless assertion)
- gemini -> cc -> codex -> gemini (lossless assertion)

Each path writes to a target provider, reads back the written artifact,
and compares the result against the original canonical session field by
field: role, content, tool_calls (name + arguments), tool_results
(content + is_error), and message count.

A dedicated redaction-verification test ensures none of the fixture files
contain sensitive markers (paths, hostnames, API keys, private key
headers) that might have survived sanitization.

Fixtures added:
- tests/fixtures/real_world/cc_real_world_sanitized.jsonl (64K, Claude Code)
- tests/fixtures/real_world/codex_real_world_sanitized.jsonl (9K, Codex)
- tests/fixtures/real_world/gemini_real_world_sanitized.json (25K, Gemini)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
